original_statement: how many banat bulgarians were living in romania in 1940?
mutated_statement: how many members of the minority community were living in the country in 1940 while simultaneously being recorded as both present and absent?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Location generalization + Constraint addition: "banat bulgarians" → "members of the minority community" | "romania" → "the country" | added clause "while simultaneously being recorded as both present and absent" (introduces a new contradictory administrative/recording condition).

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中明确陈述的关键信息：一是“表格对于1940年的唯一条目是Karol Telbizov，显示罗马尼亚一侧人口为12,000”；二是“‘同时记录为既在场又不在场’的措辞并未改变表中给出的数字值”。Agent的具体表现为：在iteration日志中直接选取1940年行并以simple_query返回“12,000”，judge标注为[Correct]，未对矛盾性语句提出质疑、未尝试澄清、也未通过逻辑解释或折中手段处理该自相矛盾的约束。基于这些证据，归类为“无视所有矛盾指令”最为恰当，因为Agent忽略了变异问题中新增的自相矛盾条件，仅以可行的子集（表中数值）继续执行并得出结论，未表现出识别或修正矛盾的行为。
